name: Generate validator module with barrel export
description: Create a validators directory with email and phone validators plus an index barrel file
task: Create a /project/src/validators/ module with: 1) email.ts that exports a validateEmail function, 2) phone.ts that exports a validatePhone function, 3) index.ts barrel that re-exports everything.

args.content:
export { validateEmail, normalizeEmail } from './email';
export { validatePhone, formatPhone } from './phone';

turns.text: Created the validators module with email.ts, phone.ts, and index.ts barrel export.
